study_advice: Shoma okumara obwire bukye, bwanyima ohumureho.
Shomera omu mwanya ogucureire kandi ogwine omushana ogumara.
Gabanyamu eby'okushoma byawe omu bicweka bikye.
Buuza omushomesa ninga munywani waawe waaba otakyetegyereza.
store_help: Ninyobora kukuhwera kwetegyereza obuguzi, obwingi, ninga amakuru g'ekintu.
fallback: Tinkyetegyeire gye. Garuka okigambe omu bigambo byangu.
